de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface BlockContract

  • All Superinterfaces:
    SpecificationElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SimpleBlockContract

    public interface BlockContract
extends SpecificationElement

      Returns the method in which the block is located.
      String getUniqueName()

      Returns the original used variables like self, result etc..

      Returns the original used variables like self, result etc.
      boolean hasInfFlowSpecs() 
      boolean hasJoinProcedure() 
      boolean hasMby()
      Tells whether the contract contains a measured_by clause.
      boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."

      boolean isTransactionApplicable()

      • hasModifiesClause

        boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
        Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
        Returns:
        whether this contract is strictly pure.

      • hasJoinProcedure

        boolean hasJoinProcedure()
        Returns:
        True iff a join procedure has been specified for this block contract.

      • setInstantiationSelf

        void setInstantiationSelf(Term selfInstantiation)

      • getInstantiationSelfTerm

        Term getInstantiationSelfTerm(TermServices services)
        Returns the term internally used for self or a newly instantiated one. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.

      • getPre

        Term getPre(Services services)
        Returns the original precondition of the contract.

      • getPost

        Term getPost(Services services)
        Returns the original postcondition of the contract.

      • getMod

        Term getMod(Services services)
        Returns the original modifies clause of the contract.

      • getInfFlowSpecs

        ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> getInfFlowSpecs()
        Returns the original information flow specification clause of the contract.

      • getVariables

        BlockContract.Variables getVariables()
        Returns the original used variables like self, result etc..

      • getVariablesAsTerms

        BlockContract.Terms getVariablesAsTerms(Services services)
        Returns the original used variables like self, result etc. as terms.
